inst✝ : DecidableEq Inhabitant
inst2 : Fintype Inhabitant
stB : B ∈ Knight ↔ (A ∈ Knight ↔ Knight.card = 1)
stC : C ∈ Knight ↔ B ∈ Knave
stCn : C ∈ Knave ↔ B ∈ Knight
BKnave : B ∈ Knave
⊢ B ∈ Knave and C ∈ Knight

proof:

  <;> simp_all [Finset.mem_singleton, DecidableEq]

  have CKnight : C ∈ Knight := by
    have h : C ∈ Knight ↔ B ∈ Knave := stC
    have h' : B ∈ Knave := BKnave
    exact h.mpr h'
  
  exact ⟨BKnave, CKnight⟩
